TextRun.Text: be permitted as +(职业、用途、身份)

RichText.Text: 1. be bathed in the sunshine take a bath n. bathe (v.) 2. be committed to doing sth. commit oneself to doing sth. make a commitment to doing sth. 3. find no sign of life 4. become a model for green construction 5. maintain 24-hour emergency services 6. with a concerned expression on his face 7. award the highest honor to top students the highest honor awarded to top students 8. be equipped with an open mind 9. ask for permission （permit- permission） permit n./v. permitted-permitting permit doing sth. permit sb. to do sth. be permitted as +(职业、用途、身份)

TextRun.Text: 洗澡； n. 沐浴 v.

RichText.Text: 1. 沐浴在阳光中 洗澡； n. 沐浴 v. 2. 致力于做某事； 投身于做某事； 承诺做某事 3. 未发现生命迹象 4. 成为绿色建筑典范 5. 维持 24 小时紧急服务 6. 他面露担忧的神色 7. 授予最高荣誉给优等生 授予给优等生的最高荣誉 8. 具有/拥有/配备豁达开阔的胸襟 9. 请求许可 许可证(n.)；允许(v.) 允许做某事 允许某人做某事 被允许作为...使用/存在
